Logical Model: CDA - FR Prescription

Official URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-prescription Version: 0.1.0-snapshot
Draft as of 2026-06-18 Computable Name: FRCDAPrescription

Entrée FR-Prescription: IHE-PCC - Supply - Cette entrée permet de décrire l’acte de prescription lié à un élément substanceAdministration par l’intermédiaire d’un élément entryRelationship dans les entrées suivantes : FR-Traitement, FR-Traitement-maladie-rare, FR-Vaccination, FR-Vaccin-recommande, FR-Fluide-intraveineux

Usages:

  • Use this Logical Model Profile: CDA - FR Traitement, CDA - FR Vaccin recommande and CDA - FR Vaccination

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description Differentials, Snapshots, and other representations.

  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Supply Supply XML Namespace: urn:hl7-org:v3
Instance of this type are validated by templateId
Logical Container: ClinicalDocument (CDA Class)
Slices for templateId 3..3 II Slice: Unordered, Open by value:root
templateId:ccdSupplyActivity 1..1 II Conformité Supply activity (CCD)
@root 1..1 oid, uuid, ruid Required Pattern: 2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.1.34
templateId:iheSupplyEntry 1..1 II Conformité Supply Entry (IHE PCC)
@root 1..1 oid, uuid, ruid Required Pattern: 1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.7.3
templateId:frPrescription 1..1 II Conformité FR-Prescription (CI-SIS)
@root 1..1 oid, uuid, ruid Required Pattern: 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.44
@classCode S 1..1 cs
@moodCode S 1..1 cs Si la prescription a déjà été dispensée : moodCode='EVN' - Si la prescription est en attente de dispensation : moodCode='INT'
id S 1..1 II Identifiant de l'entrée
repeatNumber 0..1 IVL_INT Nombre de renouvellements possibles
quantity 0..1 PQ Quantité - L'unité est exprimée selon le système de codage UCUM.
performer S 0..* Performer2 Dispensateur
time S 1..1 IVL_TS Date de la dispensation
@nullFlavor 0..1 cs Required Pattern: UNK
assignedEntity 1..1 AssignedEntity Dispensateur
id S 1..1 II Identifiant du dispensateur
assignedPerson
name 1..1 PN
representedOrganization
name 1..1 ON
author 0..1 FRCDAAuthor
entryRelationship S 0..* EntryRelationship Prescripteur - Une prescription est en attente de dispensation (moodCode='INT'), peut comporter le prescripteur.
@typeCode 1..1 cs Required Pattern: SUBJ
act 0..1 FRCDAInstructionsAuDispensateur

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
II-1 error Supply.typeId, Supply.product.typeId, Supply.performer.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.assignedPerson.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.assignedPerson.sdtcAsPatientRelationship.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.representedOrganization.typeId, Supply.entryRelationship.typeId An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor. root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()

Summary

Mandatory: 7 elements(3 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 7 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • CDA - author (https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author)
  • CDA - FR Instructions au dispensateur (https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-instructions-au-dispensateur)

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Supply.templateId

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
II-1 error Supply.typeId, Supply.product.typeId, Supply.performer.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.assignedPerson.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.assignedPerson.sdtcAsPatientRelationship.typeId, Supply.performer.assignedEntity.representedOrganization.typeId, Supply.entryRelationship.typeId An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor. root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()

Summary

Mandatory: 7 elements(3 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 7 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • CDA - author (https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author)
  • CDA - FR Instructions au dispensateur (https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-instructions-au-dispensateur)

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Supply.templateId
